sections.name: Section A: Executive Summary
Sections B & C: Validation Team & Means
sections.content:
Draft "Section B: Validation Team" and "Section C: Means of Validation". Detail the validation team members, the desk review process, on-site inspection activities, interviews conducted, and the sampling approach used. 

User Assessment: {{assessment}}

sections.name: Section D: Validation Findings
sections.content:
Draft "Section D: Validation Findings". Based on all project documents and standard requirements, provide a detailed analysis of the project's compliance, covering prior consideration, PDD conformity, project activity description, methodology application, baseline scenario, additionality, and monitoring plan.

User Assessment: {{assessment}}

sections.name: Section E: Internal Quality Control
sections.content:
Draft "Section E: Internal Quality Control". Describe the VVB's internal quality control and technical review process that was applied to this validation engagement.

User Assessment: {{assessment}}

sections.name: Section F: Validation Opinion
sections.content:
Draft "Section F: Validation Opinion". Synthesize all findings and assessments into a final, formal validation opinion for the project.

User Opinion: {{opinion}}

sections.name: Section A: Executive Summary
Sections B & C: Team & Materiality
sections.content:
Draft "Section B: Verification Team" and "Section C: Application of Materiality". Detail the verification team and explain the materiality threshold and its application during the verification process.

User Assessment: {{assessment}}

sections.name: Section D: Means of Verification
sections.content:
Draft "Section D: Means of Verification". Describe the desk/document review, on-site inspection (if any), interviews conducted, and the sampling approach used during verification.

User Assessment: {{assessment}}

sections.name: Section E: Verification Findings
sections.content:
Draft "Section E: Verification Findings". Detail the assessment of compliance with the monitoring report, project implementation, post-registration changes, and the assessment of data and calculations for emission reductions.

User Assessment: {{assessment}}

sections.name: Sections F, G, H: IQC, Opinion & Certification
sections.content:
Draft "Section F: Internal Quality Control", "Section G: Verification Opinion", and "Section H: Certification Statement". Describe the quality control process, provide the final verification opinion, and write the formal certification statement.

User Opinion: {{opinion}}
